svg.title: StackPenni social treatment frames v1
svg.desc: Six 9:16 frame mockups showing the hook text treatment, caption system, navy title card, speaker plate, watermark placement, and closing end card.
svg.text: Caption — one position, one gold word

text.style: font-family: var(--font-sans); font-weight: 500; font-size: 44px; letter-spacing: 1px;;fill:rgb(217, 169, 63);stroke:none;color:rgb(11, 11, 11);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", sans-serif;font-size:44px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

font-family: var(--font-sans); font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: 3px;;fill:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke:none;color:rgb(11, 11, 11);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

font-family: var(--font-sans); font-weight: 500; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.5px;;fill:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke:none;color:rgb(11, 11, 11);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

font-family: Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 11px;;fill:rgb(232, 184, 75);stroke:none;color:rgb(11, 11, 11);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:Georgia, serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:400;font-style:italic;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

font-family: var(--font-sans); font-weight: 500; font-size: 17px; letter-spacing: 1px;;fill:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke:none;color:rgb(11, 11, 11);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", sans-serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

svg.text: End card — same 2s close, every episode
